name: wot-smart-greenhouse
description: IoT Smart Greenhouse based on W3C Web of Things (WoT) standard

scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/dashboard', { recursive: true }); fs.readdirSync('src/dashboard').filter(f => f.endsWith('.html') || f.endsWith('.css')).forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(path.join('src/dashboard', f), path.join('dist/dashboard', f))); fs.mkdirSync('dist/img', { recursive: true }); fs.readdirSync('src/img').forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(path.join('src/img', f), path.join('dist/img', f)))"
